datasets.name: d001
datasets.query:
SELECT 'activity_enriched_daily' AS entity, COUNT(*) AS c FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_activity_enriched_daily`
UNION ALL SELECT 'sleep_nightly', COUNT(*) FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_sleep_nightly`
UNION ALL SELECT 'weekly_workouts', COUNT(*) FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_weekly_workout_summary`
UNION ALL SELECT 'cardio_vitals_daily', COUNT(*) FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_cardio_vitals_daily`
UNION ALL SELECT 'hk_family_weekly', COUNT(*) FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_hk_family_weekly`

datasets.name: d002
datasets.query:
SELECT day, user_id, move_ring_ratio, total_steps, exercise_ring_ratio, stand_ring_ratio
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_activity_enriched_daily`
WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
ORDER BY day

datasets.name: d003
datasets.query:
SELECT sleep_night, user_id, deep_sleep_min, rem_sleep_min, core_sleep_min, awake_min, total_tracked_min
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_sleep_nightly`
WHERE sleep_night >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
ORDER BY sleep_night DESC

datasets.name: d004
datasets.query:
SELECT week_start, user_id, workout_count, total_duration_min, total_energy_kcal, total_distance_m / 1000.0 AS distance_km
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_weekly_workout_summary`
WHERE week_start >= date_sub(current_timestamp(), 732)
ORDER BY week_start

datasets.name: d005
datasets.query:
SELECT day, user_id, resting_hr_avg, heart_rate_avg, heart_rate_max, hrv_sdnn_avg, spo2_avg
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_cardio_vitals_daily`
WHERE day >= current_date() - INTERVAL 730 DAY
ORDER BY day

datasets.name: d006
datasets.query:
SELECT week_start, user_id, metric_family,
  concat(user_id, ' | ', metric_family) AS series_key,
  avg_value, readings
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_hk_family_weekly`
WHERE week_start >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 732 DAY
ORDER BY week_start, metric_family

datasets.name: d007
datasets.query:
SELECT ingest_day, user_id, record_type, row_count
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_bronze_ingest_daily`
WHERE ingest_day >= current_date() - INTERVAL 730 DAY
ORDER BY ingest_day DESC, row_count DESC

datasets.name: d008
datasets.query:
SELECT day, user_id, total_steps, sample_intervals
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_daily_steps`
WHERE day >= current_date() - INTERVAL 730 DAY
ORDER BY day

datasets.name: d009
datasets.query:
SELECT day, user_id, regexp_replace(hk_type,'HKQuantityTypeIdentifier','') AS metric, avg_value, sample_rows
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_hk_quantity_daily_gold`
WHERE day >= current_date() - INTERVAL 730 DAY
ORDER BY sample_rows DESC
LIMIT 500

datasets.name: d011
datasets.query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS user_count
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_activity_enriched_daily`
WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 90)

datasets.name: d012
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id,
  round(avg(total_steps), 0) AS avg_steps_30d,
  max(total_steps) AS peak_steps_30d,
  round(sum(total_steps), 0) AS sum_steps_30d
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_daily_steps`
WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY avg_steps_30d DESC NULLS LAST

datasets.name: d013
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id,
  round(avg(move_ring_ratio), 3) AS avg_move_ratio,
  round(avg(exercise_ring_ratio), 3) AS avg_exercise_ratio,
  round(avg(stand_ring_ratio), 3) AS avg_stand_ratio
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_activity_enriched_daily`
WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY avg_move_ratio DESC NULLS LAST

datasets.name: d014
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id,
  round(avg(deep_sleep_min), 1) AS avg_deep_min,
  round(avg(rem_sleep_min), 1) AS avg_rem_min,
  round(avg(total_tracked_min), 1) AS avg_tracked_min,
  count(*) AS nights
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_sleep_nightly`
WHERE sleep_night >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY avg_tracked_min DESC NULLS LAST

datasets.name: d015
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id,
  sum(workout_count) AS workouts_12w,
  round(sum(total_duration_min), 0) AS total_minutes_12w,
  round(sum(total_energy_kcal), 0) AS total_kcal_12w
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_weekly_workout_summary`
WHERE week_start >= date_sub(current_timestamp(), 732)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY workouts_12w DESC NULLS LAST

datasets.name: d016
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id,
  round(avg(resting_hr_avg), 1) AS avg_resting_hr,
  round(avg(heart_rate_avg), 1) AS avg_hr,
  round(avg(spo2_avg), 3) AS avg_spo2
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_cardio_vitals_daily`
WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY user_id

datasets.name: d017
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id, sum(row_count) AS ingest_rows_30d
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_gold_bronze_ingest_daily`
WHERE ingest_day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY ingest_rows_30d DESC NULLS LAST

datasets.name: d018
datasets.query:
SELECT user_id, count(DISTINCT metric) AS distinct_hk_types
FROM (
  SELECT user_id, regexp_replace(hk_type, 'HKQuantityTypeIdentifier', '') AS metric
  FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_hk_quantity_daily_gold`
  WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
) t
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY distinct_hk_types DESC NULLS LAST

datasets.name: d019
datasets.query:
SELECT day, subject_id AS user_id, sum(event_count) AS total_events
FROM `users`.`ankur_nayyar`.`01_wearable_subject_daily_gold`
WHERE day >= date_sub(current_date(), 730)
GROUP BY day, subject_id
ORDER BY day DESC, user_id
LIMIT 800

frame.title: Bronze ingest rows by user (30d, gold rollup)
Calendar day (activity, vitals, steps, HK qty, subject daily)
